# ICP CLI Documentation

> Command-line tool for developing and deploying applications on the Internet Computer Protocol (ICP).

- [index](https://cli.internetcomputer.org/0.1/index.md): 

## Start Here

- [quickstart](https://cli.internetcomputer.org/0.1/quickstart.md)
- [tutorial](https://cli.internetcomputer.org/0.1/tutorial.md)
